description.value:
1 or 2

Requirements You're wielding a firearm or crossbow and are adjacent to a siege weapon.

You're familiar with ranged weapons of all sizes, and can efficiently move to use them in tandem. If you spent one action, you Launch the siege weapon and Strike with your firearm or crossbow in any order, using the same multiple attack penalty for both attacks. If you spent two actions, you Load the siege engine and Interact to reload your firearm or crossbow in any order, and don't need a free hand to do so.
